basic_details.job_title: Central University of Rajasthan Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: The Central University of Rajasthan has released the official Project Assistant Notification 2026. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced under the Central University of Rajasthan Project Assistant Recruitment 2026. Candidates holding a Postgraduate degree in any discipline of Life Sciences or a Graduate degree in associated fields are eligible to apply. Interested applicants can submit their applications via email on or before 14 June 2026. The official notification PDF and application details are provided below.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: Post Graduate Degree in any discipline of Life Sciences or Graduate Degree in associated fields
qualification.details: Post Graduate Degree in any discipline of Life Sciences or Graduate Degree in associated fields.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Central University of Rajasthan Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 14-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download Central University of Rajasthan Project Assistant Job 2026 Notification

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Project Assistant position?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your email application for the Project Assistant position at the Central University of Rajasthan is 14th June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Assistant role?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Post Graduate Degree in any discipline of Life Sciences or a Graduate Degree in associated fields to be eligible for the Project Assistant position.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Project Assistant post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Project Assistant position will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 27,000/-.

faq.question: Q4. How can I apply for the Project Assistant vacancy?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email. You need to send your complete application along with required documents to the official email address mentioned in the notification.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for the Project Assistant position?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve an Offline Interview and Document Verification.

faq.question: Q7. What is the total number of vacancies for the Project Assistant post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Project Assistant position at the Central University of Rajasthan.

faq.question: Q8. Where is the Central University of Rajasthan located?
faq.answer: The Central University of Rajasthan is located in Ajmer, Rajasthan, with the pincode 305817.

faq.question: Q9. Is this a permanent or contractual job?
faq.answer: This is a contractual job opportunity at the Central University of Rajasthan.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the 'Important Links' section of this article, under the 'Official Notification PDF' description.
